created.description: Timestamp when the object was created

e.description: RSA key value (public exponent) for Key binding

kty.description: Cryptographic algorithm family for the certificate's keypair. Valid value: `RSA`

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the object was last updated

n.description: RSA modulus value that is used by both the public and private keys and provides a link between them

use.description: Acceptable use of the certificate. Valid value: `sig`

x5c.description: X.509 certificate chain that contains a chain of one or more certificates

x5t#S256.description: X.509 certificate SHA-256 thumbprint, which is the base64url-encoded SHA-256 thumbprint (digest) of the DER encoding of an X.509 certificate
